ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player is currently a part of */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player in the team */,
  "player_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "batting_hand" TEXT /* Hand the player bats with */,
  "throwing_hand" TEXT /* Hand the player throws with */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Hometown of the player */,
  "rookie_year" INTEGER /* Year the player started playing in the MLB */,
  "contract_expiration" INTEGER /* Year the player's current contract expires */,
  "salary" REAL /* Player's current salary */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who played in the game */,
  "hits" REAL /* Number of hits achieved by the player */,
  "total_bases" REAL /* Total bases achieved by the player */,
  "home_runs" REAL /* Number of home runs hit by the player */,
  "RBIs" REAL /* Number of runs batted in by the player */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "at_bats" INTEGER /* Number of at-bats in the game */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored by the player */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Number of walks taken by the player */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts by the player */,
  "stolen_bases" INTEGER /* Number of stolen bases by the player */,
  "catcher_interferences" INTEGER /* Number of catcher interferences */,
  "plate_appearances" INTEGER /* Number of plate appearances */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "inning" TEXT /* Inning in which the performance metrics are recorded */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location of the game (home or away) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_opponent_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "betting_lines" (
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each betting line */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player associated with the betting line */,
  "hits_odds" TEXT /* Betting odds for hits (over/under) */,
  "total_bases_odds" TEXT /* Betting odds for total bases (over/under) */,
  "home_runs_odds" TEXT /* Betting odds for home runs (over/under) */,
  "RBIs_odds" TEXT /* Betting odds for RBIs (over/under) */,
  "line_date" TEXT /* Date when the betting line was set */,
  "over_under_hits" REAL /* Over/under line for hits */,
  "over_under_total_bases" REAL /* Over/under line for total bases */,
  "over_under_home_runs" REAL /* Over/under line for home runs */,
  "over_under_RBIs" REAL /* Over/under line for RBIs */,
  "betting_bookmaker" TEXT /* Name of the bookmaker setting the odds */,
  "betting_market" TEXT /* Market where the betting line is available */,
  "line_status" TEXT /* Status of the betting line (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_lines_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to (e.g., AL, NL) */,
  "team_foundation_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_arena" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "team_location" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "team_manager" TEXT /* Name of the current team manager */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Primary and secondary colors of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "account_balance" REAL /* Current balance in the user's betting account */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bets" (
  "bet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who placed the bet */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the betting line for the player */,
  "bet_amount" REAL /* Amount of money wagered on the bet */,
  "bet_date" TEXT /* Date the bet was placed */,
  "bet_status" TEXT /* Current status of the bet (e.g., pending, settled) */,
  "bet_type" TEXT /* Type of bet (e.g., over/under, moneyline, parlay) */,
  "bet_description" TEXT /* Description of the bet */,
  "bet_outcome" TEXT /* Actual outcome of the bet */,
  "bet_settlement_date" TEXT /* Date the bet was settled */,
  "bet_source" TEXT /* Source where the bet was placed (e.g., web, mobile app) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bets_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES betting_lines ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., bet update, new line) */,
  "notification_source" TEXT /* Source of the notification (e.g., system, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_betting_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each betting history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user associated with the bet */,
  "bet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bet made by the user */,
  "bet_result" TEXT /* Result of the bet (e.g., win, loss) */,
  "winnings" REAL /* Winnings from the bet */,
  "bet_description" TEXT /* Description of the bet */,
  "bet_type" TEXT /* Type of bet */,
  "bet_outcome" TEXT /* Actual outcome of the bet */,
  "bet_settlement_date" TEXT /* Date the bet was settled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_betting_history_bet_id FOREIGN KEY ("bet_id") REFERENCES bets ("bet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_betting_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
